    371 +    if row is None or "conflict_reason" not in str(row["sql"]):
    372 +        return
    373 +    conn.executescript(
    374 +        """
    375 +        PRAGMA foreign_keys = OFF;
    376 +        BEGIN;
    377 +        ALTER TABLE plans RENAME TO plans_old_single_master_migration;
    378 +        CREATE TABLE plans (
    379 +            name              TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    380 +            status            TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (status IN ('draft','accepted','superseded')),
    381 +            created_at        TEXT NOT NULL,
    382 +            updated_at        TEXT NOT NULL,
    383 +            body              TEXT NOT NULL,
    384 +            frontmatter_json  TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
    385 +            body_hash         TEXT NOT NULL,
    386 +            file_hash         TEXT,
    387 +            materialized_path TEXT NOT NULL,
    388 +            revision_count    INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    389 +            sync_state        TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'synced'
    390 +                              CHECK (sync_state IN ('synced','parse_error')),
    391 +            parse_error       TEXT
    392 +        );
    393 +        INSERT INTO plans (name,status,created_at,updated_at,body,frontmatter_json,
    394 +                           body_hash,file_hash,materialized_path,revision_count,
    395 +                           sync_state,parse_error)
    396 +        SELECT name,status,created_at,updated_at,body,frontmatter_json,
    397 +               body_hash,file_hash,materialized_path,revision_count,
    398 +               CASE WHEN sync_state IN ('synced','parse_error') THEN sync_state
    399 +                    ELSE 'synced' END,
    400 +               parse_error
    401 +          FROM plans_old_single_master_migration;
    402 +        DROP TABLE plans_old_single_master_migration;
    403 +        CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_plans_status ON plans(status);
    404 +        COMMIT;
    405 +        PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON;
    406 +        """
    407 +    )
    408 +
    409      row = conn.execute(

• Working (2m 02s • esc to interrupt)


› Find and fix a bug in @filename

  gpt-5.4 high · ~/Documents/code/murder
